title: Further Reports Concerning This
description: According to Ibn Bashshar-Yahya b. Said-Sufyan-Ismail b. Umayyah-'Abd Allah b. 'Urwah-his father ('Urwah)'6'A'ishah: The Messenger of God married me in Shawwal and consummated his marriage to me in Shawwal. 'A'ishah liked her women's marriages to be consummated in Shawwal. According to Ibn WAY-his father-Sufyan-Ismail b. (1263] Umayyah-'Abd Allah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
